"'''Green Hair'''" was the name [[Darsha Assant]] gave to one of the leaders of the [[Raptors (gang)|Raptor gang]].

==Biography==
He was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], lean and wiry of build, with a shock of green hair kept up in an electrostatic field. [[Lorn Pavan]] referred to him as "Fashion Plate".

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]'' {{Ab|Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
